Finally, if you want to follow all news related to SUMO, don’t forget about our community forums, official blog and Twitter account. We also meet almost every Monday - and you can join us.

Lákotán, bí o bá fẹ́ tẹ̀lé àwọn ìròhìn tí ó jọ SUMO, máṣe gbàgbé nípa àwọn àpérò àwùjọ wa, búlọ́gù gbogboogbò àti Àkọ́ọ́lẹ̀ twitter. A tún maa ń pàdé ní gbogbo ọjọ́ ajé - o sì le darapọ̀ mọ́ wa.

From hardcore web developers to "how do I install Firefox" first time users, everybody needs your help in the forum! Share your knowledge by pointing people to the right help articles and providing troubleshooting steps for their individual questions.

Láti ọ̀dọ̀ àwọn olùmúgbèrú ojúlé wẹ́ẹ̀bù gbòógì sí "báwo ni màáṣe ṣàfilọ́lẹ̀ Firefox" àwọn olùṣàmúlò àkọkọ́, gbogbo ènìyàn nílò ìrànwọ́ rẹ ni àpèjọ! Pín ìmọ̀ rẹ nípa títọ́ka àwọn ènìyàn sí ibi ìrànwọ́ àwọn aròkọ tí ó tọ́ kí o pesè ìgbésẹ̀ wíwá àléébù fún àwọn ìbéèrè wọn kọ̀ọ̀kan.

If you are interested in learning more about how this whole support thing works, check out our contributor training . This includes some cool troubleshooting info, guidelines, how-to questions, and info about where to find more help if stuck.

Bí o bá fẹ́ láti kọ́si nípa bí gbogbgo àtìlẹ́hìn yíi ṣe ń ṣiṣẹ́, wo ìkọ́ni olùdásí wa . Lára rẹ̀ ni ìwifún wíwá àléébù, àwọn ìlànà, ọ̀nà ìdáhùn ìbéèrè, àwọn ìwifún nípa ibi ìwá ìrànwọ́ bí o bá há.

If you like writing and teaching then the Knowledge Base is the place for you. We need contributors that can write, edit or proof read articles in English. Thousands of people are accessing our Knowledge Base every week. Imagine how many will be helped by you!

Bí o bá fẹ́ràn kíkọ àti ìkọ́ni nígbà náà Ìpínlẹ̀ Ìmọ̀ ni ibẹ̀. A nílò àwọn olùdásí tí o lé kọ́, ṣàtúnse tàbí túnkà àwọn aròkọ ní Gẹ̀ẹ́sì. Ẹgbẹgbẹ̀rún àwọn ènìyàn ń wo Ìpínlẹ̀ Ìmọ̀ wa lọ́sẹ̀ẹ̀sẹ̀. Ro iye àwọn tí a ó ràn lọ́wọ́!

If you submit information to Mozilla when you crash, you'll be given a crash ID which uniquely identifies your crash and lets us look at details that may help identify the cause. To find your recently submitted crash IDs, go to about:crashes in your location bar. Click for detailed instructions.

Bí o bá fi ìwifún sílẹ̀ fún Mozilla nígbà tí o dàrú, wá gba Ìdámọ̀ Ìdàrú tí ó ṣàfihàn ìdàrú rẹ tí yóò jẹ́kí o wá àlààyé tí yó̀o jẹ́kí o mọ ohun tó fà. Láti wá Ìdámọ̀ Ìdàrú tí o fi sílẹ̀ láìpẹ́, lọsí nípa:àwọn ìdàrú ní ibi ìpamọ́ pẹpẹ. Ṣíra tẹ̀ fún ìlànà ẹ̀kúnrẹ́rẹ́.

In order to prevent spam, we are limiting the number of answers that can be posted within a short period of time. If you want to post more please create a post on the contributors forum requesting that you be white-listed.

Kí a dẹ́kun ìwé àìbèèrèfún, a ń dín iye àwọn ìdáhùn tí a lè fọ̀rọ̀ránṣẹ́ ní àkókò kúkurú. Bí o bá fẹ́ fọ̀rọ̀ púpọ̀ ránṣẹ́ jọ̀wọ́ ṣẹ̀dá ìfọ̀rọ̀ránṣẹ́ ní àpèjọ àwọn olùdásí bèèrè pé kí a yọ orúkọ rẹ kúrò nínu àwọn ìbàjẹ́.

In order to prevent spam, we are limiting the number of answers that can be posted within a short period of time. If you want to post more please create a post on the contributors forum requesting that you be white-listed.

Mozilla Support is a community of enthusiastic volunteers and employees trying to support our users around the globe.
Àtìlẹ́hìn Mozilla jẹ́ olùfarajìn àwùjọ tí onítàra àti òṣìṣẹ́ tí o ń gbìyànjú láti ṣe àtìlẹ́hìn fún àwọn olùṣàmúlò wa ní àgbayé.
Mozilla Support is a community of enthusiastic volunteers and employees trying to support our users around the globe.
Àtìlẹ́hìn Mozilla jẹ́ olùfarajìn àwùjọ tí onítàra àti òṣìṣẹ́ tí o ń gbìyànjú láti ṣe àtìlẹ́hìn fún àwọn olùṣàmúlò wa ní àgbayé.
Mozilla Support is a community of enthusiastic volunteers and employees trying to support our users around the globe. Join us for an incredible adventure!

Àtìlẹ́hìn Mozilla jẹ́ àwùjọ àwọn afàrajìn onítara àti òṣìṣẹ́ tí o ń gbìyànjú láti sàtìlẹ́hìn àwọn olùṣàmúlò ni gbogbo àgbayé. Darapọ̀ mọ́ wa fún gbìdánẁo máni gbàgbé!
Mozilla Support is a community of enthusiastic volunteers and employees trying to support our users around the globe. Join us for an incredible adventure!

Àtìlẹ́hìn Mozilla jẹ́ àwùjọ àwọn afàrajìn onítara àti òṣìṣẹ́ tí o ń gbìyànjú láti sàtìlẹ́hìn àwọn olùṣàmúlò ni gbogbo àgbayé. Darapọ̀ mọ́ wa fún gbìdánẁo máni gbàgbé!

Mozilla support is fully powered by our volunteer community that is helping hundreds of users everyday. This community is formed by passionate Firefox and Thunderbird users who take some of their spare time to help others. We couldn't do it without your passion and enthusiasm. Your contribution, as minor as it might seem, has tremendous value. Solving one issue in the support forums can help up to 1000 users a day!

Àtìlẹ́hìn Mozilla ní ẹ̀kúnrẹ́rẹ́ agbára láti ọ̀dọ̀ àwùjọ olùfarajìn tí o ńṣe ìrànwọ́ fún ọgọ́gọ́rùn àwọn àṣàmúlò lójojúmọ́. Àwùjọ yìí ni a dá sílẹ̀ lọ́wọ́ àwọn àṣàmúlò onítara Firefox àti Thunderbird tí o lo àkókò ìgbà tí ọwọ́ dilẹ̀ láti ran àwọn ẹlòmíràn lọ́wọ́. Akòle ṣé láìsi ìtara àti ìgbóná ọkàn rẹ. Ìdasí rẹ, bí o tì wùn kí ó kéré tó, ní iye lórí púpọ̀. Ìyànjú ìṣòro kan ní àwọn àpérò àtìlẹ́hìn lè ṣèrànwọ́ fún àwọn bíi àṣàmúlò 1000 lóòjọ́!

Your contribution, as minor as it might seem, has tremendous value. Solving one issue in the support forums can help up to 1000 users a day!

Àtìlẹ́hìn Mozilla ní ẹ̀kúnrẹ́rẹ́ agbára láti ọ̀dọ̀ àwùjọ olùfarajìn tí o ńṣe ìrànwọ́ fún ọgọ́gọ́rùn àwọn àṣàmúlò lójojúmọ́. Àwùjọ yìí ni a dá sílẹ̀ lọ́wọ́ àwọn àṣàmúlò onítara Firefox àti Thunderbird tí o lo àkókò ìgbà tí ọwọ́ dilẹ̀ láti ran àwọn ẹlòmíràn lọ́wọ́. Akòle ṣé láìsi ìtara àti ìgbóná ọkàn rẹ. Ìdasí rẹ, bí o tì wùn kí ó kéré tó, ní iye lórí púpọ̀. Ìyànjú ìṣòro kan ní àwọn àpérò àtìlẹ́hìn lè ṣèrànwọ́ fún àwọn bíi àṣàmúlò 1000 lóòjọ́!

Now you can combine both and help Firefox users on Twitter. It's quick, it's easy, and you don't have to be a tech superstar to do it. We call it our Army of Awesome.

Báyìí o lè pa méjèjì pọ̀ kí o ṣèrànwọ́ fún àwọn olùṣàmúlò Firefox ní Twitter. Ó yára, rorùn, o kòsì nílò láti jẹ́ ọ̀jọ̀gbọ́n onímọ̀ ẹ̀rọ láti ṣé. A ńpè ní Ọmọ Ogun ti Ìyàlẹ́nu wa.

SUMO is now using Gravatars as avatars. You must change your Gravatar on gravatar.com.

It can take a few minutes for the avatar change to take effect. You may need to wait a few minutes and reload the page to see your new Gravatar.

SUMO ńlo Gravatars bíi avatars. O gbọ́dọ̀ ṣàyípadà Gravatar rẹ ní gravatar.com.

Yóò gba ìṣẹjú díẹ̀ kí avatar rẹ tó yípadà láti bẹ̀rẹ̀ iṣẹ́. O lè nílò láti dúró fún ìṣẹjú díẹ̀ kí o tún gbàwálẹ̀ ojú ewé láti rí Gravatar rẹ titun.

The SUMO Army of Awesome 2010 mini-badge is part of the SUMO series. It represents contribution to SUMO in 2010; in this case: 50 Army of Awesome tweets. Congrats to all SUMO Army of Awesome 2010 badge earners for advancing the Mozilla Mission!

Ọmọ ogun ti Ìyàlẹ́nu SUMO 2010 báájì kékeré jẹ́ lára àtẹ̀léra SUMO. Ó ṣojú ìdasí ti SUMO ní 2010; ní ipò yíì: Ọmọ ogun ti Ìyàlẹ́nu 50 túwìtì. Ìkú oríire fún gbogbo Ọmọ ogun ti Ìyàlẹ́nu SUMO 2010 tó gba báàjì fún ìtẹsiwájú Iṣẹ́ Mozilla!

This will notify localizers and translations will be marked as "needing updates" on dashboards. Most changes—updating an image, fixing {for} markup, adding or removing non-critical sections—should use this.

Èyí yóò pàkíyèsí olùsọdìbílẹ̀ àti ìtumọ̀ yóò lámì bii "nílò àtúnyẹ̀wò" ní aṣèrànwọ́ ìtajà. Ọ̀pọ̀ àyípadà—ìṣàtúnyẹ́wò àwòrán, ń yanjú {for} ìfiyèsí, ṣàfikún tàbí ṣàyọkúrò ìpele tí kòle—gbọ́dọ̀ lo èyí.

This will notify localizers and translations will be marked "out of date" on dashboards. Translations will show a warning to users that they are out of date and that the English version is the most accurate. Use this when the old instructions are completely unusable.

Èyí yóò pàkíyèsí olùsọdìbílẹ̀ àti ìtumọ̀ yóò lámì bii "nílò àtúnyẹ̀wò" ní aṣèrànwọ́ ìtajà. Àwọn ìtumọ̀ yóò ṣàfihàn ìkilọ̀ fún àwọn olùṣàmúlò tí kò bá ìgbà mu tí Gẹ̀ẹ́sì sí jẹ́ ṣe rẹ́gí. Lo èyí nígbà tí àwọn ìlànà kò ṣeélò mọ́ rárá.

We are always very happy to hear from new people who like helping on the forums so if you haven’t met our community yet please take a minute to introduce yourself . If you want to stay low-profile, that’s also ok :). You can also find us all hanging out on IRC, on the #sumo channel .

Inú wa maa ń dùn nígbà gbogbo láti gbọ́ lọ́dọ̀ àwọn ènìyàn titun tí ó fẹ́ràn láti ṣèrànwọ́ ní àwọn àpérò nítorí náà bí o kò báìtí bá àwùjọ wa pàdé náà jọ̀wọ́ lo ìṣẹjú kan láti sọ nípa rẹ . Bí o kò bá fẹ́ fi ara hàn báyì, ó daa bẹ́ẹ̀ :). O lè rí gbogbgo wa ní orí IRC, ní ìkànnì #sumo .

A ó nífẹ̀ láti wá ibi tí ó dára fún ọ láti ran àwọn olùṣàmúlò lọ́wọ́, nítorí náà jọ̀wọ́ fi í-meélì ránṣẹ́ síwa pẹ̀lú orúkọ aṣàmúlò àti àgbègbè tí wá fẹ́ láti kópa. Jọ̀wọ́ ní òmìnira láti ṣàfikún àwọn ìmọ̀ rẹ, a ó wá ọ̀nà tí ó tọ́ láti lò wọ́n :)

When German misses a level 2 change, the coverage drops to 50%, so 1% of 10%= 0.1% overall

When the Home page article is the only localized article and it's up to date in German, then our overall coverage is 2% of 10%=0.2% overall (+ the English coverage)
